title: Add Rust monorepo discovery/index benchmarks
description: Benchmark discovery and index build for single-folder vs recursive multi-folder layouts, matching Python benchmark scenarios.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Rust benchmarks added in rust/src/bin/discovery_benchmark.rs (single vs multi, serial + parallel) and rust/src/bin/index_benchmark.rs (index build/cache timings).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Rust benchmark reports timings for single vs recursive multi-project layouts and matches Python scenarios.
